disclaimer: This methodology is constructed for educational purposes. It illustrates a typical technology risk assessment approach for SC-regulated capital market entities. Entities should develop their own methodology based on their specific risk profile.
title: Capital Market Technology Risk Assessment Methodology
description: Risk assessment methodology for evaluating technology risks in capital market operations under SC-GL/2-2023 (R1-2024) Guidelines on Technology Risk Management.
applicableTo: SC-regulated capital market intermediaries, market operators, clearing houses, and central depositories

reviewCycle.frequency: Annual review of methodology; per-engagement for new systems
triggers: Major technology incident affecting market operations
New trading system or market infrastructure deployment
SC guideline update or new regulatory direction
Significant change in threat landscape for capital markets
Entry into new market segment or product

likelihoodScale.description: Five-level scale for assessing the probability of a technology risk materialising in capital market operations

levels.label: Rare
levels.description: Highly unlikely; no precedent in capital markets sector

levels.label: Unlikely
levels.description: Could occur but not expected; isolated incidents globally

levels.label: Possible
levels.description: May occur; comparable incidents in Asian capital markets

levels.label: Likely
levels.description: Expected to occur; active threats targeting capital markets

levels.label: Almost Certain
levels.description: Expected frequently; ongoing threat campaigns targeting market infrastructure

impactScale.description: Five-level scale for assessing the impact on capital market operations, clients, and regulatory standing

levels.label: Insignificant
levels.description: No market impact; no client impact; no regulatory concern

levels.label: Minor
levels.description: Brief trading delay; minor client inconvenience; no SC inquiry

levels.label: Moderate
levels.description: Trading disruption; client complaints; SC informal inquiry

levels.label: Major
levels.description: Extended market disruption; material client harm; SC formal investigation

levels.label: Catastrophic
levels.description: Market integrity compromise; systemic impact; licence consideration

riskMatrix.description: 5x5 risk matrix mapping likelihood and impact to risk ratings

ratings.label: High
ratings.action: Mitigate urgently; escalate to senior management

assessmentDimensions.description: Impact on trading, clearing, and settlement operations
Impact on client orders, portfolios, and data
Exposure to cyber threats and data breaches
Risk to market data and client information integrity
Impact on market reputation and investor confidence
